query:
-- Add new test types: Steel Bend/Rebend, Soil CBR, Bitumen Extraction, ACV, AIV, LA Abrasion
INSERT IGNORE INTO test_types (code, name_en, name_ar, category, form_template, unit, description, is_active)
VALUES
  -- Steel: Bend & Rebend
  ('STEEL_BEND_BS4449', 'Bend & Rebend Test (BS 4449)', 'اختبار الانحناء والانحناء العكسي (BS 4449)', 'steel', 'steel_bend_rebend', 'Pass/Fail', 'Visual inspection after 180° bend and 90° rebend', 1),
  ('STEEL_BEND_ASTM', 'Bend & Rebend Test (ASTM A615)', 'اختبار الانحناء والانحناء العكسي (ASTM A615)', 'steel', 'steel_bend_rebend', 'Pass/Fail', 'Visual inspection after 180° bend per ASTM A615', 1),

  -- Soil: CBR
  ('SOIL_CBR', 'California Bearing Ratio (CBR)', 'نسبة تحمل كاليفورنيا (CBR)', 'soil', 'soil_cbr', '%', 'CBR test per BS 1377-4 / ASTM D1883', 1),

  -- Asphalt: Bitumen Extraction
  ('ASPH_BITUMEN_EXTRACT', 'Bitumen Content by Extraction', 'محتوى البيتومين بالاستخلاص', 'asphalt', 'asphalt_bitumen_extraction', '%', 'Bitumen extraction per BS EN 12697-1', 1),

  -- Aggregate: Crushing Value
  ('AGG_CRUSHING', 'Aggregate Crushing Value (ACV)', 'قيمة سحق الركام (ACV)', 'aggregate', 'agg_crushing', '%', 'ACV per BS 812-110', 1),

  -- Aggregate: Impact Value
  ('AGG_IMPACT', 'Aggregate Impact Value (AIV)', 'قيمة صدم الركام (AIV)', 'aggregate', 'agg_impact', '%', 'AIV per BS 812-112', 1),

  -- Aggregate: LA Abrasion
  ('AGG_LA_ABRASION', 'Los Angeles Abrasion Test', 'اختبار تآكل لوس أنجلوس', 'aggregate', 'agg_la_abrasion', '%', 'LA Abrasion per ASTM C131 / BS EN 1097-2', 1);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 377JW8jvRBid6gE.e90905f81c0c --database LsEH5DDGJizNggnY9JVscW --execute 
-- Add new test types: Steel Bend/Rebend, Soil CBR, Bitumen Extraction, ACV, AIV, LA Abrasion
INSERT IGNORE INTO test_types (code, name_en, name_ar, category, form_template, unit, description, is_active)
VALUES
  -- Steel: Bend & Rebend
  ('STEEL_BEND_BS4449', 'Bend & Rebend Test (BS 4449)', 'اختبار الانحناء والانحناء العكسي (BS 4449)', 'steel', 'steel_bend_rebend', 'Pass/Fail', 'Visual inspection after 180° bend and 90° rebend', 1),
  ('STEEL_BEND_ASTM', 'Bend & Rebend Test (ASTM A615)', 'اختبار الانحناء والانحناء العكسي (ASTM A615)', 'steel', 'steel_bend_rebend', 'Pass/Fail', 'Visual inspection after 180° bend per ASTM A615', 1),

  -- Soil: CBR
  ('SOIL_CBR', 'California Bearing Ratio (CBR)', 'نسبة تحمل كاليفورنيا (CBR)', 'soil', 'soil_cbr', '%', 'CBR test per BS 1377-4 / ASTM D1883', 1),

  -- Asphalt: Bitumen Extraction
  ('ASPH_BITUMEN_EXTRACT', 'Bitumen Content by Extraction', 'محتوى البيتومين بالاستخلاص', 'asphalt', 'asphalt_bitumen_extraction', '%', 'Bitumen extraction per BS EN 12697-1', 1),

  -- Aggregate: Crushing Value
  ('AGG_CRUSHING', 'Aggregate Crushing Value (ACV)', 'قيمة سحق الركام (ACV)', 'aggregate', 'agg_crushing', '%', 'ACV per BS 812-110', 1),

  -- Aggregate: Impact Value
  ('AGG_IMPACT', 'Aggregate Impact Value (AIV)', 'قيمة صدم الركام (AIV)', 'aggregate', 'agg_impact', '%', 'AIV per BS 812-112', 1),

  -- Aggregate: LA Abrasion
  ('AGG_LA_ABRASION', 'Los Angeles Abrasion Test', 'اختبار تآكل لوس أنجلوس', 'aggregate', 'agg_la_abrasion', '%', 'LA Abrasion per ASTM C131 / BS EN 1097-2', 1);
